title.es: Villa con vista parcial al mar en Playa Hermosa de Jacó
title.en: Villa with Partial Ocean View in Playa Hermosa de Jacó

desc.es: Villas amplias para hasta 6 huéspedes, con cocina completa y sala privada en Playa Hermosa. Ideales para familias, grupos y estancias largas.
desc.en: Spacious villas for up to 6 guests, with a full kitchen and private living area in Playa Hermosa. Ideal for families, groups, and longer stays.

Villa

Your Private Costa Rican Beach House

Partial ocean view | Full kitchen | Recently renovated

Capacity

6 persons

Size

Beds

Multiple options

Description

Designed for families, groups, and extended stays, our Villas offer the space, comfort, and flexibility of a private residence with all the amenities of a beachfront resort. Recently renovated and thoughtfully designed, these spacious accommodations feature a full kitchen, generous living space, and room for up to six guests—making them the perfect choice for family vacations, group getaways, surf trips, wedding parties, or longer stays on Costa Rica's spectacular Pacific Coast.

Villa 216: Located on the upper level and featuring one king bed, one double bed, and one trundle bed.

Villa 116: Conveniently located on the ground floor and featuring three double beds.

Wake up to tropical breezes and partial ocean views, prepare breakfast in your fully equipped kitchen, spend the day exploring Playa Hermosa, and return to relax just steps from the beach, resort pool, and oceanfront dining. Whether you're gathering with family, celebrating with friends, or simply looking for more space to experience Costa Rica, our Villas provide the perfect blend of privacy, comfort, and resort luxury.

More space. More freedom. More unforgettable memories.
